lede: A look at June 5 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Chaeryeong and Robert Barbieri, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Nintendo Switch 2
events.desc: The Nintendo Switch 2 video game console is released worldwide.

events.title: 2009 Peruvian political crisis
events.desc: After 65 straight days of civil disobedience, at least 31 people are killed in clashes between security forces and indigenous people near Bagua, Peru.

events.title: 2009 Hermosillo daycare center fire
events.desc: A fire at a day-care center kills 49 people in Hermosillo, Mexico.

events.title: Noël Mamère
events.desc: Noël Mamère, Mayor of Bègles, celebrates marriage for two men for the first time in France.

events.title: Tropical Storm Allison
events.desc: Tropical Storm Allison makes landfall on the upper-Texas coastline as a strong tropical storm and dumps large amounts of rain over Houston. The storm causes $5.5 billion in damages, making Allison the second costliest tropical storm in U.S. history.

events.title: Tank Man
events.desc: The Tank Man halts the progress of a column of advancing tanks for over half an hour after the Tiananmen Square protests of 1989.

events.title: Teton Dam
events.desc: The Teton Dam in Idaho, United States, collapses. Eleven people are killed as a result of flooding.

events.title: Robert F. Kennedy
events.desc: Presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy is assassinated by Sirhan Sirhan.

events.title: Zungeni Mountain skirmish
events.desc: The Zungeni Mountain skirmish took place between British and Zulu forces during the second invasion of the Zulu Kingdom.

events.title: June Rebellion
events.desc: The June Rebellion breaks out in Paris in an attempt to overthrow the monarchy of Louis Philippe.

births.name: Willard Miller
births.line: Canadian-American sailor, Medal of Honor recipient (died 1959)

deaths.text: Ray Bradbury, American science fiction writer and screenwriter
Sam Yorty, American soldier and politician, 37th mayor of Los Angeles

observances.text: Christian feast day: Luke Loan Ba Vu (Roman Catholic Church)
Christian feast day: Genesius, Count of Clermont
